EXPLANATION: This is a famous historical work by the Marquis de Condorcet, published in 1785. The title and author are correct, and the work is widely available in digital historical archives.
LINK: https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k52646v
FOUND_TITLE: Essai sur l'application de l'analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie-Jean-Antoine-Nicolas de Caritat, marquis de Condorcet
FOUND_YEAR: 1785
